CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2004 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-18-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Sep-21-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: The cause came on regularly for mandatory settlement conference in Dept. 514 before the Hon. Thomas J. Mellon, Jr., Clerk: Vicki Mack, Reporter: Loretta Najera CSR #5153
Appearances:
Michael Kelly, Esq., for and with plaintiff Ross Charney.
G. Patrick Galloway, Esq. for defendant UC Regents and Tim Rebbert, Esq. for defendant UC Regents (Octagon).
The matter has settled, on the record, the terms set forth as follows:
Plaintiff and Defendant agree that all claims put forth in the complaint are resolved for compensation in the amount of $75,000.00, subject to the approval process of the UC Regents and Octagon. The $75,000.00 shall be structured for college for the children and plaintiff waives legal fees and costs reimbursement. The Court shall rule on the minor's compromise to be submitted within 90 days in return a dismissal with prejudice being filed. Each side to bear their own attorney fees and costs. The parties and counsel agree to and understand the terms of the settlement agreement in open court and on the record.
